creator: n-butcher@gol.com
text:
/usr/ports/devel/linux-js won't compile.

I get this output from the compile:-

linux_js_uhid.c: In function `linux_js_uhid_configure_item':
linux_js_uhid.c:580: warning: 'max' might be used uninitialized in this function
linux_js_uhid.c:581: warning: 'bit' might be used uninitialized in this function
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/linux-js/work/linux-js-2.2.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/linux-js/work/linux-js-2.2.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/linux-js.

How-To-Repeat: Try installing linux-js from ports.
